name: niucodes-image-gen
description: Standalone OpenAI Images SDK wrapper for generation and editing.

scripts.build:bin:mac: npm run bundle:bin:mac && pkg --compress GZip --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output bin/niucodes-image-gen-macos-arm64 build/niucodes-image-gen-mac.cjs && pkg --compress GZip --targets node22-macos-x64 --output bin/niucodes-image-gen-macos-x64 build/niucodes-image-gen-mac.cjs
scripts.build:bin:win: npm run bundle:bin:win && pkg --compress None --public --no-bytecode --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/niucodes-image-gen-win-x64.exe build/niucodes-image-gen-win.cjs
scripts.build:bin: npm run build:bin:mac && npm run build:bin:win
